compiled_state.title: CI-hook-tests: 3 agent files missing behavioral_testing_standard reference -> test-agent-standard-reference.sh fails
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-agent-standard-reference.sh fails with 3 assertions:
- test_red_test_writer_references_behavioral_testing_standard
- test_code_reviewer_test_quality_references_behavioral_testing_standard
- test_red_test_evaluator_references_behavioral_testing_standard

These agent definition files are expected to reference the behavioral testing standard but do not contain the expected reference.

## Expected Behavior
All test-writing and test-quality agent definitions should reference behavioral-testing-standard.md.

## Actual Behavior
3 of the expected references are missing.

## Evidence
CI run 24319865314 (2026-04-13), Hook Tests job: 4 pass, 3 fail.
